title: Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
company: Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Subject Matter Expert in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
